title: Game of Darts Guide
seoTitle: Game of Darts Guide | BarkinMad Studios
description: Complete Game of Darts guide covering game modes, scoring, DartBot, statistics, leaderboards, achievements, settings, and gameplay tips.
summary: Complete guide covering getting started, every supported game mode, scoring, match setup, statistics, leaderboards, achievements, DartBot, caller voices, premium features, Game Center and gameplay tips.
sourceNotes: Created from the current Game of Darts documentation.
Content reflects features available in the current version of the app.

sections.heading: Welcome to Game of Darts
paragraphs: Game of Darts includes multiple classic darts games, detailed player statistics, Game Center leaderboards and achievements, DartBot AI, custom caller voices and extensive match customisation.
Whether you are practising alone, playing with friends or competing in league matches, this guide introduces the app and links to detailed help for every feature.

sections.heading: Getting Started
paragraphs: Begin by creating your players, choose a game mode, configure the match options, then press Game On to start playing. After each match you can review your statistics, achievements and leaderboard progress.
Quick Start is available for players who want to jump straight into a standard Match game with minimal setup.
bullets: Create local players or use DartBot.

sections.heading: Explore Every Game Mode
paragraphs: The app includes Match (X01), Cricket, Snooker Darts, Bob's 27, 1 to 20, Hare & Hound, Halve It and All 5s, with dedicated guides explaining rules, scoring and strategy.

sections.heading: More Than Just Scoring
paragraphs: Track long-term performance, unlock achievements, compete on Game Center leaderboards, customise caller voices, challenge DartBot and explore premium features throughout the app.
